description: User invokes /start-review-team with --multi-model and explicit 3-reviewer roster.
assertion: multi_model is true; reviewers list has 3 entries

description: Multi-model preflight returned warning: only 1 external CLI configured. User prompted 'Continue spawning pool? [Y/n]' and responds Y.

state.warning_message: Only 1 external model CLI is configured. Multi-model review may be limited.

assertion: preflight_result is warning; user_continued is true
lock_acquired is true; method is mkdir

description: config.json written with multi_model: true. index.json updated atomically.
assertion: config_json.multi_model is true; pool_state is idle

description: Spawn prompts composed. Pool Lead receives all 3 overlays (Identity Confirm + Multi-Model + Lifecycle). Reviewer prompts receive Identity Confirm + Multi-Model but NOT Lifecycle overlay.

state.pool_lead_prompt:
You are the Pool Lead for standing pool 'review-pool'.
### Standing Pool Identity Confirm Overlay
You are a persistent standing-pool agent.
### Multi-Model Conditional Overlay
Route tasks to external model CLIs when beneficial.
### Standing Pool Lifecycle Overlay
Monitor TTL and manage pool lifecycle.

reviewer_prompts.code-reviewer:
You are code-reviewer in standing pool 'review-pool'.
### Standing Pool Identity Confirm Overlay
You are a persistent standing-pool agent.
### Multi-Model Conditional Overlay
Route tasks to external model CLIs when beneficial.
reviewer_prompts.security-reviewer:
You are security-reviewer in standing pool 'review-pool'.
### Standing Pool Identity Confirm Overlay
You are a persistent standing-pool agent.
### Multi-Model Conditional Overlay
Route tasks to external model CLIs when beneficial.
reviewer_prompts.performance-engineer:
You are performance-engineer in standing pool 'review-pool'.
### Standing Pool Identity Confirm Overlay
You are a persistent standing-pool agent.
### Multi-Model Conditional Overlay
Route tasks to external model CLIs when beneficial.

assertion: pool_lead_prompt contains all 3 overlay headings; reviewer prompts contain Identity Confirm and Multi-Model but NOT Lifecycle overlay

description: Confirmation shown to user. multi_model: true reflected in output.
assertion: multi_model is true; pool_name is review-pool
